title: Berger Paints Global Group is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Berger Paints Global Group is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Berger Paints Global Group is actively seeking a talented and motivated Quality Control Engineer to join our dynamic team in Agra. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Berger Paints Global Group:
Berger Paints Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Berger Paints Global Group!
